etymology.description: 艸(艸) (cǎo, "grass; plant") + 合(合) (hé, "combine") = a plant used for communication -> reply
etymology.interpretation: The character 荅(荅) combines the semantic 艸(艸) (cǎo, "grass; plant") with the phonetic 合(合) (hé, "combine") to convey the idea of a plant that metaphorically 'responds' or 'replies', possibly reflecting a historical context where communication through plants or notes was common.
